text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, Haru Urara stands on a stage in her
favorite shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Hellooo, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Everyone in the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Hellooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll be your shopping district poster Umamusume
for today! My name is Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wait, poster Umamusume? Do I have to make
posters?

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Of course not, Urara! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Well, I don't really know what I'm supposed
to do, but whatever it is, I'll do my very best!

text_block_list.name: Everyone in the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Good luck! We're rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Poster Umamusume, temporary store manager, PR manager... I get to do all these jobs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara always gives it her all when she races.
Which is why she was suddenly chosen to do some
promotional work!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So cool! This actually sounds like so much
fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna try 'em all! Where are the jobs located?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a little different from usual PR work because the client isn't a company or store—it's a whole area... Haru Urara's beloved shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I see! So it's pretty much the same as how I
normally help them?
choice_data_list: It's an actual job, so not quite.
It's an actual job, so not quite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
PR means that Haru Urara won't just be
representing herself—she'll be the face of the
shopping district. The increased visibility would
certainly benefit her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's important for her right now is both
training and increasing her popularity as an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I doubt she'd understand that even if I
explained it to her. So...
choice_data_list: You better give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Will do, Trainer! Haru Urara, awaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Haru Urara heads to the shopping
district not for pleasure, but for business.

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's do our best today, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! Oh, I mean, roger!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Haha! You can just act normal, don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Really? King told me I had to be super formal
'cause it's a real job.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But if you say so! Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just like that! Okay, it's a bit sudden, but I
have a job for you already. I'd like you to go visit
all the stores around here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okey-dokey! Just take a loop around, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right, it's loop-de-loop time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! It's the fish stall owner! Hi there!

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Urara! You're working hard again
today, I see!

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
What are ya here for? Shopping? I've got some
delicious tuna in stock today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Is that so? You know how fussy I am about
tuna!

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
I know! That's why I mentioned it. How about we
call it a match, then?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! If I call it delicious, then you win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's sooo delicious!

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: I knew it! Then I have your seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh, something's going on over there.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: You're right. Oh, the fish stall... That reminds me, I do need something for tonight's dinner...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, hello, ladies! Please come take a look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People gather around Haru Urara wherever she
goes. Her personality is just that magnetic. It
really is heartwarming to see.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! These daikon radishes are so big! And
they're only a hundred yen?!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
Yep, just one hundred yen! They're all bursting
with flavor, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooh, they look so good! Can I munch on one?

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
As long as you buy 'em first, you can have as
many as you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ooooh... I'll take five, please!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your patronage!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Nice one, Haru Urara! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks! You all should buy some too!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Hey! Are you an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I am! I run super-duper fast and everything!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Cool! I wanna watch your races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? I'd love that! Please do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter where Haru Urara goes, she draws a
crowd. If only she could use this power on a race,
she'd win no problem. Just as I'm pondering this
thought, someone approaches me...

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! Aren't you Urara's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a woman from the shopping district's
promotion association. She's watched over Haru
Urara since she entered the academy.
choice_data_list: Thank you for choosing Haru Urara for this.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
No, I should be thanking you. She's been a big
help to the shops here.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she came here, this district has really
been thriving. This place was practically a ghost
town before she showed up.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: ... Urara isn't that strong, is she?

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: I heard she's never won a race before...
choice_data_list:
She hasn't, but she's working hard to get
stronger every day.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Yes, she always tries her best, doesn't she? But...
she can't become the strongest overnight.

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: But that's okay. As long as she enjoys running...

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
It really pushes us to do our best too. We're
happy just the way she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks fondly at Haru Urara as she talks. Her
gaze is full of love, like a mother watching her
child.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"As long as she enjoys running..." That's what a
parent would say about their child. That's love.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...But is that really enough?
